title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: LA PINE SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 51627 Coach Road La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Varies, call for information. Some SBHC are for students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district, and others are open to the general public. Hours: Mon/Wed/ Fri 8am--5pm Closed for lunch Monday and Fridays 1:20pm-2:20pm Closed for lunch Wednesdays 12:40pm-1:40pm (541) 536-3435 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 536-3435 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA PINE SBHC
